title: Usage history log + sweech history command
description: No ~/.sweech/usage-log.jsonl. No trend lines. No "you spent $84 on OpenRouter last week". Every user with a multi-provider setup will want this within 30 days.

context.text: Source (verbatim from 2026-05-16 audit): Audit Section 2: "No ~/.sweech/usage-log.jsonl. No trend lines. No you spent $84 on OpenRouter last week"

acceptanceCriteria: Every quota refresh appends a JSONL row: { ts, workspace, util5h, util7d, tokensUsed, costUsd? }
sweech history [--workspace X] [--since 7d] [--json] reads and summarises
Log auto-rotated at 50MB or 90 days, whichever first
Cost field populated only for providers that expose $ (openrouter, groq); omitted otherwise — no fake numbers
